title: Fit test - 1st screen close button [TBD]
scenario: Fit Test screen closes and returns to Device Settings when tapping close button on first Fit Test screen
steps: Tap on a connected Poly Bluetooth device to open Device Settings
In Device Settings, locate and tap Fit Test
On the first Fit Test screen, tap the close button (X)
expected: The Fit Test screen is closed and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen.
